pages.text: A serum is useless in the vial. The $(flesh)Bio-Injector$() is the razor-needled device that puts it into a body — a mob's, or your own.
pages.title: The Bio-Injector

pages.text: The $(flesh)Bio-Injector$() loads a serum and drives it home with a needle. Use it on a mob to inject that mob; use the self-inject action to dose yourself. The needle itself does a little damage on the jab — unless you enchant that away.

$(bold)Two enchantments suit it:$()$(br)$(li)$(flesh)Piercing$() — raises the chance to push the needle through armour.$(li)$(flesh)Anesthetic Touch$() — nullifies the needle's damage entirely. Pair it with Piercing for a clean, painless injection every time.
pages.title: Enchanting the Needle

pages.text: $(bold)What it is for.$() Aging and Breeding serums turn the Injector into a livestock tool. Enlargement and Shrinking are for spectacle and for fitting creatures through your $(l:6_flesh/membranes)membranes$(). Cleansing and Absorption, self-injected, are survival kit. The needle is how the whole chemistry chapter reaches the world.
pages.title: In Practice
